name: 9 Juniper Lane — Oceanfront 8BR, Hilton Head
description: Oceanfront luxury home on South Forest Beach, Hilton Head Island, with direct sand access via a private wooded boardwalk. 8 en-suite bedrooms (14 beds, 7.5 baths) across 5,226 sq ft on three levels, plus a separate 2-bedroom guest house with its own full kitchen and balcony. Sleeps up to 19 overnight. The outdoor centerpiece is a 26'x14' heated pool and spa, a stone-paved deck, a firepit, three ocean-view decks, a full propane grill and a grassy backyard — an indoor-outdoor layout built for large gatherings. Open-concept main living level with cathedral ceilings and floor-to-ceiling ocean views, a chef's kitchen with double ovens, and 11 smart TVs throughout. Guest-favorite, rated 5.0 (6 reviews); Superhost.

price.note: Whole-home weekly rental. Quoted via Airbnb for the wedding week Sep 27–Oct 4, 2026 (covers the target Sat Oct 3): $19,267 for 7 nights less a $1,768 weekly discount = $17,499 before taxes. SC/Beaufort County lodging taxes (~12–13%) are added at checkout. Strongly seasonal — see the seasonal quotes. Pulled 2026-06-07 from Airbnb's booking widget.

availability.notes: Checked 2026-06-07 via Airbnb's availability calendar. Of the target Saturdays, only Oct 3 is open — Aug 22, Aug 29 and Oct 10 fall inside booked weeks. The open early-October run (Oct 1–7) is bookable as the 7-night week Sep 27–Oct 4 (a 7-night minimum applies; the Oct 1–8 framing is rejected as a turnover conflict). October fills fast — mid/late-Oct (from Oct 19) is otherwise wide open.

alcohol.note: Private whole-home rental — you supply and serve your own bar.

music.note: Curfew not published. South Forest Beach is residential and the Town of Hilton Head has a noise ordinance — confirm amplified-sound rules / cutoff with the host before booking.

tables.note: No event tables — rent separately for the reception.

tent.note: No tent — arrange your own cover for the backyard reception.

dressingSuite.note: 8 en-suite bedrooms incl. a primary suite — ample getting-ready space.

spaces.notes: Oceanfront ceremony on the beach via the private boardwalk; reception on the grassy backyard / stone deck by the heated pool. Three ocean-view decks and a firepit for gathering.

notes: Airbnb whole-home rental on South Forest Beach. Strong fit for the beachfront-house option: private beach access for the ceremony + backyard for the reception, open on the target Sat Oct 3. Two open questions before it's a real contender — (1) whether the host permits a 40–60-guest wedding event (the listing markets overnight stays for up to 19, but the host's own embedded "Booked events" calendar is full of weddings, so events look welcomed) and any event fee/cap; (2) week rate (~$17.5k) is well over the $7k venue price-limit, though under the overall $30k budget. Bedrooms: 8 en-suite + a 2-BR guest house = 10.

flags.label: Over venue price limit
flags.detail: ~$17,500/week before taxes is well above the $7,000 venue price-limit in Preferences (still under the overall $30,000 budget). Whole-week rental cost.

flags.label: Large-event permission & cap unconfirmed
flags.detail: Airbnb listing markets overnight stays (sleeps up to 19); it doesn't state whether a 40–60-guest wedding event is permitted, the max event headcount, or any event fee. The host's embedded "Booked events" calendar shows recurring weddings, so events appear welcomed — confirm directly with the host.

flags.label: Noise/music rules unconfirmed
flags.detail: Residential South Forest Beach with a Town of Hilton Head noise ordinance — confirm amplified-sound cutoff with the host.
